active.text: Photoreal live-action period drama (circa 1840s). 35mm film grain, shallow depth of field, anamorphic-friendly framing. Motivated practical light only: candle, oil lamp, moonlight through shutters. No cartoon, no soft-3D CG, no children's picture-book look.

Single chamber primarily; claustrophobic. Camera close on the Narrator's eyes and hands; slow push-ins; hold on the floorboards and the old man's veiled eye. Horror through restraint, not gore spectacle.
Narrator is the on-camera (and VO) speaker: tense, intimate, increasingly unhinged but articulate 19th-century English. Old Man mostly silent / breath / one cry. Officers calm, official, few lines.
